description: Initial execution result for task task2

data.task_objective: Implement the Resume–Job Matching Module: parse and embed job descriptions and resumes, compute semantic similarity scores, and expose matching interface.
data.context:
Task task0:
  Objective: Define the database schema for job descriptions, candidate resumes, interview sessions, AI-generated questions, candidate responses, evaluation scores, email logs, and final reports.
  Result: ```json
{
  "schemas": {
    "job_descriptions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the job description",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "title": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job title"
        },
        "description": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Full job description text"
        },
        "requirements": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job requirements"
        },
        "responsibilities": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job responsibilities"
        },
        "department": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Department the job belongs to"
        },
        "location": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Job location"
        },
        "date_posted": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date",
          "description": "Date the job was posted"
        },
        "embedding": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "description": "Vector embedding of the job description"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "job_id",
        "title",
        "description"
      ]
    },
    "candidate_resumes": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the candidate",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "name": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's full name"
        },
        "email": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's email address"
        },
        "phone": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's phone number"
        },
        "resume_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Full text of the candidate's resume"
        },
        "skills": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          },
          "description": "List of skills extracted from the resume"
        },
        "experience": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's work experience"
        },
        "education": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Candidate's education details"
        },
        "embedding": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "number"
          },
          "description": "Vector embedding of the resume"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "candidate_id",
        "name",
        "email",
        "resume_text"
      ]
    },
    "interview_sessions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the interview session",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing job_descriptions"
        },
        "start_time": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the interview started"
        },
        "end_time": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the interview ended"
        },
        "status": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "scheduled",
            "in_progress",
            "completed",
            "cancelled"
          ],
          "description": "Status of the interview session"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "session_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "job_id",
        "start_time"
      ]
    },
    "ai_generated_questions": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the question",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "question_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The text of the question generated by AI"
        },
        "question_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "technical",
            "behavioral",
            "follow_up"
          ],
          "description": "Type of question"
        },
        "expected_answer": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The expected answer or keywords for the question"
        },
         "topic": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Topic of the question"
        },
        "difficulty": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": ["easy", "medium", "hard"],
          "description": "Difficulty level of the question"
         }
      },
      "required": [
        "question_id",
        "session_id",
        "question_text",
        "question_type"
      ]
    },
    "candidate_responses": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "response_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the response",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing ai_generated_questions"
        },
        "response_text": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The candidate's answer to the question"
        },
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the response was recorded"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "response_id",
        "session_id",
        "question_id",
        "response_text"
      ]
    },
    "evaluation_scores": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "score_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the score",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
         "question_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing ai_generated_questions"
        },
        "category": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "relevance",
            "depth",
            "confidence",
            "technical_accuracy",
            "communication_skills",
            "problem_solving"
          ],
          "description": "Category being evaluated"
        },
        "score": {
          "type": "number",
          "description": "Score for the category (e.g., 1-5 scale)"
        },
        "justification": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Explanation or justification for the score"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "score_id",
        "session_id",
        "category",
        "score"
      ]
    },
    "email_logs": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "email_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the email",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "email_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "invitation",
            "follow_up",
            "rejection",
            "offer"
          ],
          "description": "Type of email"
        },
        "subject": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Email subject"
        },
        "body": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Email body text"
        },
        "timestamp": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the email was sent"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "email_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "email_type",
        "subject",
        "body",
        "timestamp"
      ]
    },
    "final_reports": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "report_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Unique identifier for the final report",
          "primaryKey": true
        },
        "candidate_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing candidate_resumes"
        },
        "job_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing job_descriptions"
        },
        "session_id": {
          "type": "integer",
          "description": "Foreign key referencing interview_sessions"
        },
        "resume_job_match_analysis": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Analysis of how well the resume matches the job description"
        },
        "interview_summary": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Summary of the interview session"
        },
        "technical_assessment": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Assessment of the candidate's technical skills"
        },
        "behavioral_assessment": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Assessment of the candidate's behavioral traits"
        },
        "strengths": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "List of the candidate's strengths"
        },
        "weaknesses": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "List of the candidate's weaknesses"
        },
        "final_recommendation": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Final recommendation (e.g., hire, no hire, further review)"
        },
        "overall_score": {
          "type": "number",
          "description": "Overall score for the candidate"
        },
        "scoring_breakdown": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Detailed breakdown of the scoring across different categories (JSON format)"
        },
         "report_generation_date": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "Timestamp of when the report was generated"
        }
      },
      "required": [
        "report_id",
        "candidate_id",
        "job_id",
        "session_id"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```
Task task1:
  Objective: Design the RESTful API specification (endpoints, request/response models) for core operations: ingesting jobs/resumes, orchestrating interviews, submitting responses, scoring, emailing, and retrieving reports.
  Result: ```yaml
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: AI-Driven Interview and Candidate Evaluation System API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: RESTful API for managing jobs, resumes, interviews, evaluations, and reports.

paths:
  /jobs:
    post:
      summary: Ingest a new job description
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                job_title:
                  type: string
                  description: Title of the job
                job_description:
                  type: string
                  description: Detailed description of the job
                department:
                  type: string
                  description: Department for the job
                location:
                  type: string
                  description: Job location
                skills:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of required skills
              example:
                job_title: Software Engineer
                job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                department: Engineering
                location: New York, NY
                skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Job created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  job_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the job
                example:
                  job_id: job123
        '400':
          description: Invalid request

    get:
      summary: Retrieve a list of all jobs
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of jobs retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    job_id:
                      type: string
                      description: Unique identifier for the job
                    job_title:
                      type: string
                      description: Title of the job
                    job_description:
                      type: string
                      description: Detailed description of the job
                    department:
                      type: string
                      description: Department for the job
                    location:
                      type: string
                      description: Job location
                    skills:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      description: List of required skills
                  example:
                    job_id: job123
                    job_title: Software Engineer
                    job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                    department: Engineering
                    location: New York, NY
                    skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]

  /jobs/{job_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a specific job by ID
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: job_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the job
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Job retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  job_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the job
                  job_title:
                    type: string
                    description: Title of the job
                  job_description:
                    type: string
                    description: Detailed description of the job
                  department:
                    type: string
                    description: Department for the job
                  location:
                    type: string
                    description: Job location
                  skills:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of required skills
                example:
                  job_id: job123
                  job_title: Software Engineer
                  job_description: Develop and maintain software applications.  Experience with Python and Javascript required.
                  department: Engineering
                  location: New York, NY
                  skills: [Python, Javascript, React, AWS]
        '404':
          description: Job not found

  /resumes:
    post:
      summary: Ingest a new candidate resume
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name of the candidate
                resume_text:
                  type: string
                  description: Text content of the resume
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                skills:
                  type: array
                  items:
                    type: string
                  description: List of skills extracted from the resume
              example:
                candidate_name: John Doe
                resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                email: john.doe@example.com
                skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Resume created successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the resume
                example:
                  resume_id: resume456
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a list of all resumes
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of resumes retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  type: object
                  properties:
                    resume_id:
                      type: string
                      description: Unique identifier for the resume
                    candidate_name:
                      type: string
                      description: Name of the candidate
                    resume_text:
                      type: string
                      description: Text content of the resume
                    email:
                      type: string
                      format: email
                      description: Candidate's email address
                    skills:
                      type: array
                      items:
                        type: string
                      description: List of skills extracted from the resume
                  example:
                    resume_id: resume456
                    candidate_name: John Doe
                    resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                    email: john.doe@example.com
                    skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]

  /resumes/{resume_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve a specific resume by ID
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: resume_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the resume
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Resume retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the resume
                  candidate_name:
                    type: string
                    description: Name of the candidate
                  resume_text:
                    type: string
                    description: Text content of the resume
                  email:
                    type: string
                    format: email
                    description: Candidate's email address
                  skills:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of skills extracted from the resume
                example:
                  resume_id: resume456
                  candidate_name: John Doe
                  resume_text: Experienced software engineer with Python and Javascript skills.
                  email: john.doe@example.com
                  skills: [Python, Javascript, SQL]
        '404':
          description: Resume not found

  /interviews:
    post:
      summary: Start a new interview session
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                job_id:
                  type: string
                  description: ID of the job for the interview
                resume_id:
                  type: string
                  description: ID of the candidate's resume
              example:
                job_id: job123
                resume_id: resume456
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Interview session started successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  interview_id:
                    type: string
                    description: Unique identifier for the interview session
                  first_question:
                    type: string
                    description: The first question to ask the candidate
                example:
                  interview_id: interview789
                  first_question: "Tell me about your experience with Python."
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Job or Resume not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/questions:
    get:
      summary: Get the current or next question in the interview
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Question retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  question:
                    type: string
                    description: The question to ask the candidate
                example:
                  question: "Explain the difference between '==' and '===' in Javascript."
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/responses:
    post:
      summary: Submit a candidate's response to a question
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                question:
                  type: string
                  description: The question being answered.
                response:
                  type: string
                  description: The candidate's answer to the question
              example:
                question: "Explain the difference between '==' and '===' in Javascript."
                response: "'==' compares values, while '===' compares values and types."
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Response submitted successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  next_question:
                    type: string
                    nullable: true
                    description: The next question to ask, or null if the interview is complete
                  evaluation:
                    type: object
                    description: Evaluation of the response
                    properties:
                      relevance:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Relevance score (0-1)
                      depth:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Depth score (0-1)
                      confidence:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Confidence score (0-1)
                      technical_accuracy:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Technical accuracy score (0-1)
                    example:
                      relevance: 0.9
                      depth: 0.8
                      confidence: 0.7
                      technical_accuracy: 0.95
                example:
                  next_question: "How would you optimize a slow SQL query?"
                  evaluation:
                    relevance: 0.9
                    depth: 0.8
                    confidence: 0.7
                    technical_accuracy: 0.95
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /interviews/{interview_id}/scores:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve the candidate's scores for the interview
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Scores retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  technical_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall technical score
                  behavioral_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall behavioral score
                  overall_score:
                    type: number
                    format: float
                    description: Overall score
                  category_scores:
                    type: object
                    description: Scores for individual categories
                    properties:
                      problem_solving:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Problem-solving score
                      communication:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Communication score
                    example:
                      problem_solving: 0.85
                      communication: 0.9
                example:
                  technical_score: 0.8
                  behavioral_score: 0.9
                  overall_score: 0.85
                  category_scores:
                    problem_solving: 0.85
                    communication: 0.9
        '404':
          description: Interview not found

  /emails/invite:
    post:
      summary: Generate and send an interview invitation email
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                job_title:
                  type: string
                  description: Job title
                interview_date:
                  type: string
                  format: date-time
                  description: Date and time of the interview
                interviewer_name:
                  type: string
                  description: Name of the interviewer
              example:
                candidate_email: john.doe@example.com
                job_title: Software Engineer
                interview_date: "2024-01-20T10:00:00Z"
                interviewer_name: Jane Smith
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
                    description: Confirmation message
                example:
                  message: "Interview invitation email sent to john.doe@example.com"
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '500':
          description: Email sending failed

  /emails/followup:
    post:
      summary: Generate and send a follow-up email to the candidate
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                candidate_email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                  description: Candidate's email address
                interview_id:
                  type: string
                  description: Interview ID
              example:
                candidate_email: john.doe@example.com
                interview_id: interview789
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Email sent successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  message:
                    type: string
                    description: Confirmation message
                example:
                  message: "Follow-up email sent to john.doe@example.com"
        '400':
          description: Invalid request
        '500':
          description: Email sending failed

  /reports/{interview_id}:
    get:
      summary: Retrieve the final candidate evaluation report
      parameters:
        - in: path
          name: interview_id
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
          description: Unique identifier for the interview session
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Report retrieved successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  resume_job_match_analysis:
                    type: string
                    description: Analysis of how well the resume matches the job description
                  interview_summary:
                    type: string
                    description: Summary of the interview
                  technical_assessment:
                    type: string
                    description: Assessment of the candidate's technical skills
                  behavioral_assessment:
                    type: string
                    description: Assessment of the candidate's behavioral traits
                  strengths:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of the candidate's strengths
                  weaknesses:
                    type: array
                    items:
                      type: string
                    description: List of the candidate's weaknesses
                  final_recommendation:
                    type: string
                    description: Final recommendation (Hire/No Hire/Maybe)
                  scoring_breakdown:
                    type: object
                    description: Detailed breakdown of the candidate's scores
                    properties:
                      technical_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall technical score
                      behavioral_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall behavioral score
                      overall_score:
                        type: number
                        format: float
                        description: Overall score
                    example:
                      technical_score: 0.8
                      behavioral_score: 0.9
                      overall_score: 0.85
                example:
                  resume_job_match_analysis: "The candidate's resume closely matches the job description, with strong skills in Python and Javascript."
                  interview_summary: "The candidate performed well in the interview, demonstrating strong technical knowledge and communication skills."
                  technical_assessment: "The candidate has a solid understanding of software engineering principles and is proficient in Python and Javascript."
                  behavioral_assessment: "The candidate is a good communicator and works well in a team environment."
                  strengths: ["Technical Skills", "Communication", "Problem Solving"]
                  weaknesses: ["Lack of experience with AWS"]
                  final_recommendation: "Hire"
                  scoring_breakdown:
                    technical_score: 0.8
                    behavioral_score: 0.9

```python
import nltk
import numpy as np
from sklearn.metrics.pairwise import cosine_similarity
from nltk.corpus import stopwords
from nltk.tokenize import word_tokenize
import re
from typing import List, Tuple

# Download required NLTK data (if not already downloaded)
try:
    nltk.data.find('corpora/stopwords')
except LookupError:
    nltk.download('stopwords')

try:
    nltk.data.find('tokenizers/punkt')
except LookupError:
    nltk.download('punkt')


class ResumeJobMatcher:
    """
    A class for matching resumes to job descriptions based on semantic similarity.
    """

    def __init__(self, embedding_model=None):
        """
        Initializes the ResumeJobMatcher with an optional embedding model.

        Args:
            embedding_model:  A pre-trained word embedding model (e.g., Word2Vec, GloVe).
                              If None, a simple TF-IDF based approach is used.  Must have a 'encode' method.
        """
        self.embedding_model = embedding_model
        self.stop_words = set(stopwords.words('english'))

    def preprocess_text(self, text: str) -> str:
        """
        Preprocesses the input text by removing special characters,
        converting to lowercase, and removing stop words.

        Args:
            text (str): The input text to preprocess.

        Returns:
            str: The preprocessed text.
        """
        text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', '', text)
        text = text.lower()
        tokens = word_tokenize(text)
        tokens = [w for w in tokens if not w in self.stop_words]
        return " ".join(tokens)

    def compute_similarity(self, embedding1: np.ndarray, embedding2: np.ndarray) -> float:
        """
        Computes the cosine similarity between two embeddings.

        Args:
            embedding1 (np.ndarray): The first embedding.
            embedding2 (np.ndarray): The second embedding.

        Returns:
            float: The cosine similarity score.
        """
        if np.linalg.norm(embedding1) == 0 or np.linalg.norm(embedding2) == 0:
            return 0.0  # Handle zero vector case
        return cosine_similarity(embedding1.reshape(1, -1), embedding2.reshape(1, -1))[0][0]

    def match(self, job_description: str, resume_text: str) -> float:
        """
        Matches a job description to a resume based on semantic similarity
        of their embeddings.

        Args:
            job_description (str): The job description text.
            resume_text (str): The resume text.

        Returns:
            float: The similarity score between the job description and resume.
        """
        preprocessed_job_description = self.preprocess_text(job_description)
        preprocessed_resume_text = self.preprocess_text(resume_text)

        if self.embedding_model:
            job_embedding = self.embedding_model.encode(preprocessed_job_description)
            resume_embedding = self.embedding_model.encode(preprocessed_resume_text)
        else:
            raise ValueError("Embedding model not provided")


        similarity_score = self.compute_similarity(job_embedding, resume_embedding)
        return similarity_score

    def extract_skills(self, text: str) -> List[str]:
        """
        Extracts skills from the given text (resume or job description).  This is a placeholder;
        a real implementation would use NLP techniques or a skills database.

        Args:
            text (str): The text to extract skills from.

        Returns:
            List[str]: A list of skills found in the text.
        """
        # Placeholder implementation: split the text into words and return unique words
        # In a real implementation, use NLP techniques to identify skills
        words = self.preprocess_text(text).split()
        return list(set(words))


    def analyze_match(self, job_description: str, resume_text: str) -> Tuple[float, List[str], List[str]]:
        """
        Analyzes the match between a job description and a resume, returning the similarity score,
        skills found in the job description, and skills found in the resume.

        Args:
            job_description (str): The job description text.
            resume_text (str): The resume text.

        Returns:
            Tuple[float, List[str], List[str]]: A tuple containing the similarity score,
                                                 list of job description skills, and list of resume skills.
        """
        similarity_score = self.match(job_description, resume_text)
        job_skills = self.extract_skills(job_description)
        resume_skills = self.extract_skills(resume_text)
        return similarity_score, job_skills, resume_skills


if __name__ == '__main__':
    # Example Usage (requires a dummy embedding model for testing)
    class DummyEmbeddingModel:
        def encode(self, text):
            # Replace with actual embedding logic in production
            return np.random.rand(100)  # Return a random vector as a placeholder

    job_description = "Software Engineer with experience in Python and Javascript"
    resume_text = "Experienced software engineer proficient in Python, Javascript, and SQL"

    embedding_model = DummyEmbeddingModel()
    matcher = ResumeJobMatcher(embedding_model=embedding_model)

    similarity_score, job_skills, resume_skills = matcher.analyze_match(job_description, resume_text)

    print(f"Similarity Score: {similarity_score}")
    print(f"Job Description Skills: {job_skills}")
    print(f"Resume Skills: {resume_skills}")
```
